difficulty.reason: Self-sows readily, grows fast, minimal care needed

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Tiny feathery seedlings pushing through the soil within 7-10 days

prompt.en: Look for tiny feathery green threads poking up -- that's dill! It looks like little green hairs.
prompt.da: Kig efter smaa fjerformede groenne traade, der stikker op -- det er dild! Det ligner smaa groenne haar.

growth_stages.name: Feathery Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Tall feathery fronds reaching 30-60cm, strong dill scent when touched

prompt.en: Brush the feathery leaves with your hand and smell -- what does it remind you of? Pickles!
prompt.da: Stryg de fjerformede blade med haanden og lugt -- hvad minder det dig om? Syltede agurker!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Abundant feathery fronds ready for picking, stems getting taller

prompt.en: Snip a few feathery fronds -- we'll put them on potatoes or fish tonight!
prompt.da: Klip et par fjerformede blade -- vi laegger dem paa kartofler eller fisk i aften!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Flat yellow flower clusters (umbels) attracting hoverflies and bees

prompt.en: See the tiny flies hovering near the yellow flowers? Those are hoverflies -- their babies eat aphids!
prompt.da: Ser du de smaa fluer, der svaever ved de gule blomster? Det er svirrefluer -- deres unger spiser bladlus!

human_readable.en: Water moderately. Keep soil lightly moist but not waterlogged. Drought-tolerant once established.
human_readable.da: Vand moderat. Hold jorden let fugtig, men ikke vandmaettet. Toerketolerant naar den er etableret.

harvest.notes: Harvest fronds regularly to delay flowering. Once it flowers, leaves become less flavorful but flowers attract beneficial insects. Self-sows freely if flower heads left to set seed.

companion_plants.notes: Attracts hoverflies and beneficial wasps that prey on broccoli pests. Keep away from carrots -- cross-pollination and attracts carrot fly.

message.en: Dill is getting dry -- a light watering will keep the fronds fresh!
message.da: Dilden er ved at toerre ud -- lidt vand holder bladene friske!

message.en: Hard frost warning! Dill tolerates light frost but cover if below -4C.
message.da: Haerd frost advarsel! Dild taaler let frost, men daek til under -4 grader.
